subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! Know thou the value of these days, and be firm and steadfast in the Covenant and Testament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله قدر این ایامرا بدان و بر عهد و میثاق محکم و استوار شو
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
